template_info.name: OpenChronicle Narrative Template
template_info.description: Factions, politics, story progression, and thematic elements for dynamic storytelling
template_info.purpose: Provides narrative systems with factions, story arcs, momentum mechanics, and themes
template_info.optional_fields: Any field marked with '_optional': true can be safely deleted
template_info.usage: Delete entire fields/sections with '_optional': true, or just the '_optional' key to make field required

import_adaptability.arrays_expandable: All arrays can contain any number of entries - template shows minimum structure
import_adaptability.dynamic_factions: Faction networks can expand to accommodate any number of groups
import_adaptability.flexible_structure: Import processes should expand arrays and adapt field counts dynamically

application_behavior.empty_optional_fields: Application will automatically ignore optional fields that are empty, null, or contain only placeholder values
application_behavior.unused_optional_fields: Optional fields left as {{PLACEHOLDER}} values will be treated as unused and ignored
application_behavior.processing_logic: Only populated optional fields with actual content will be processed by the application
application_behavior.conditional_requirements: Identifier fields (name, arc_name, etc.) are required only when their containing object is used. Whole sections can be deleted if unused.

factions._comment: Array can expand - add as many factions as needed

goals._comment: Array can expand - add as many goals as needed

key_members._comment: Array can expand - add as many key members as needed

relationships._comment: Array can expand - add as many faction relationships as needed

main_arcs._comment: Array can expand - add as many main story arcs as needed

key_events._comment: Array can expand - add as many key events as needed

involved_characters._comment: Array can expand - add as many characters as needed

subplot_arcs._comment: Array can expand - add as many subplot arcs as needed

current_tensions._comment: Array can expand - add as many current tensions as needed

escalation_triggers._comment: Array can expand - add as many triggers as needed

resolution_paths._comment: Array can expand - add as many resolution paths as needed

upcoming_events._comment: Array can expand - add as many upcoming events as needed

participant_requirements._comment: Array can expand - add as many requirements as needed

core_themes._comment: Array can expand - add as many core world/story themes as needed

thematic_elements._comment: Array can expand - add as many thematic elements as needed

manifestations._comment: Array can expand - add as many manifestations as needed
